prompt: Add the IPv4 static route command family
note: Added VRP-style ip route-static and no ip route-static configuration with mask length/dotted masks, next-hop/interface resolution, preference, tag, description, permanent, no-advertise, default routes, persistence, ECMP RIB/FIB support, and NULL0 discard forwarding; 291 tests pass.
decisions: Keep configured static candidates separate from resolved RMRoute entries
Re-resolve static routes whenever connected interfaces change and synchronize active routes to FIB immediately
Retain the last successful resolution for permanent routes
Represent equal-preference routes as ECMP entries and use stable destination-based FIB selection
